name: editMessageText
description: Use this method to edit text and game messages. On success, if the edited message is not an inline message, the edited Message

parameters.name: business_connection_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the business connection on behalf of which the message to be edited was sent

parameters.name: chat_id
parameters.description: Required if inline_message_id is not specified. Unique identifier for the target chat or username of the target bot, supergroup or channel in the format @username.

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: Required if inline_message_id is not specified. Identifier of the message to edit.

parameters.name: inline_message_id
parameters.description: Required if chat_id and message_id are not specified. Identifier of the inline message.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: New text of the message, 1-4096 characters after entities parsing

parameters.name: parse_mode
parameters.description: Mode for parsing entities in the message text. See formatting options for more details.

parameters.name: entities
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized list of special entities that appear in message text, which can be specified instead of parse_mode

parameters.name: link_preview_options
parameters.description: Link preview generation options for the message

parameters.name: reply_markup
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized object for an inline keyboard
